The '''Mustafar bandit sword''' was a bladed weapon that was crafted and used by the criminals on the lava [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. The base of the [[Sword/Legends|sword]] was cut into jagged triangles, likely to allow the wielder to better damage their enemy in close quarter fighting. The blade itself was not very lengthy.<ref name="SWG:MBS" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Mustafar bandit sword appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:MBS" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The Mustafar bandit sword was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan|''Trials of Obi-Wan'']] on [[November 1]], [[2005]].<ref name="SWG:MBS" />
